conversations_memory:
**Work context**

Aman works in Trust & Safety and AI safety enforcement operations, with roughly five years of experience across major technology platforms including YouTube, Meta, Google Play, TikTok, and a current GSOC Analyst role at Allied Universal supporting AI safety operations. His domain expertise spans child safety enforcement, content integrity QA, adversarial AI misuse detection, classifier calibration, and fraud/threat investigation.

**Personal context**

Aman is based in the San Francisco Bay Area. He has an interest in photo editing and experimenting with AI tools, and he actively benchmarks Claude's outputs against other AI assistants (particularly GPT) as part of his workflow.

**Top of mind**

Aman has been in an active, intensive job search targeting Trust & Safety and AI safety roles. Most recently, he completed a full application package for an Apple User Reporting and Screening Operations Lead role, including a heavily refined LaTeX resume repositioning him as an operations leader, a cover letter, portal copy-paste entries, a mock interview framework, a story bank, and an interview strategy guide. The consensus from his AI-assisted review process is that interview performance on vendor scaling, KPI design, policy ambiguity handling, and systems thinking is the key remaining differentiator.

**Brief history**

*Recent months*

Aman pursued comprehensive job application support across a wide range of roles. His priority application stack included Anthropic, 10a Labs, OpenAI, Discord, and YouTube Policy Escalations. Claude produced tailored cover letters for OpenAI, Discord, Roblox, LinkedIn, Vercel, and 10a Labs, as well as short-answer responses for Anthropic and Discord portals. Role fit assessments were provided for many additional roles (TikTok, Google Play, Meta, Roblox Vendor Operations, Amazon, YouTube), with honest prioritization guidance. Real metrics incorporated into his resume include a 15% false negative reduction at Meta and a 20% accuracy improvement at TikTok. A phishing/malware investigation incident involving a lookalike domain was identified as a real, compelling experience story woven into relevant materials. Aman also prepared for a YouTube Policy Enforcement Manager role (age appropriateness focus), developing a versioned HTML interview playbook and SQL playbook, with identified gaps around regulatory framework depth and precision-vs-recall framing.

SQL skill-building was a recurring thread, involving query practice on the WSDA Music database and a pgAdmin connection context issue (query tool opened from the wrong database) that Claude helped diagnose and resolve.

A separate session involved Python/OpenCV-based photo editing to isolate an individual from a group photo, using inpainting, HSV masking, and contour detection — results were acknowledged as imperfect due to complex background textures.

*Long-term background*

Aman has an established pattern of iterative, tool-benchmarking collaboration: he shares GPT feedback as a calibration baseline and asks Claude to reconcile or improve upon it. His working preferences include defensible, interview-ready claims backed by real metrics (he actively pushed back on fabricated numbers), surgical edits that preserve existing document structure (especially LaTeX), direct communication, and iterative refinement. His technical skill set includes Python, SQL, Java, C++, JavaScript, pgAdmin, and SQLite.
